title: BELL DISTANCE ++
description:
this mod increases the range of the “GLOW” effect on raiders from 32 blocks to 100 blocks. 
(not 128 due to the limitation of the GLOW effect itself)
body:
# No more searching for raider❌🔎

The original mechanic assumes that the radius of raid illumination is 32 blocks.

This is annoying when you try to find the last raider in a raid, and the bell can't detect him because the radius is too small.

My mod increases the raid lighting radius to 100 blocks (I would have made the radius larger, but this is a limitation of the "GLOW" effect, and I didn't want to rewrite the effect code).

# Why my mod?😎

There are already mods that perform the same function as mine, but all of them I've seen don't work on fabric 1.20.1. For example, the "Bell Finds All Raiders" datapack doesn't work in 1.20.1, but my mod does

# Installation📥
requires fabric API
